tracks.rawText: 2:36SEVDALIZA - RIDE OR DIE PTUploadReggaeton and Latin Pop fusion, The track features a syncopated dembow drum pattern with a crisp snare and a deep, rounded sub-bass, A bright, staccato synth pluck provides the melodic hook, complemented by atmospheric pads and occasional rhythmic guitar strums, Male and female vocals alternate, utilizing rhythmic delivery and melodic hooks, The arrangement includes sudden rhythmic stops, filtered transitions, and vocal chops, 95 BPM, G minor, 4/4 time signature4PublishRemix
tracks.title: SEVDALIZA - RIDE OR DIE PT

tracks.rawText: 4:01DjUploadContemporary Christian Pop, Clean electric guitar plays a palm-muted eighth-note pattern in the intro, Acoustic guitar provides rhythmic strumming throughout, A female lead vocal features a slight breathy texture in the verses and a powerful, belted chest voice in the choruses, The drum kit enters with a steady kick on every beat during the first chorus, transitioning to a full backbeat with a crisp snare and shimmering crash cymbals, A synth pad provides sustained harmonic layers, The bass guitar plays melodic, driving eighth notes that lock with the kick drum, The arrangement features a dynamic build with vocal harmonies and layered electric guitars in the bridge, Key of D Major, 74 BPM, 4/4 time4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Dj

tracks.rawText: 2:23Kick Chromev5.5High-BPM electronic trompeta with urgent chopped trumpet stabs, pitch-bent synth brass, and tight sidechained 4-on-the-floor kick, Racing hi-hat ticks, snappy claps, distorted sub-bass, and glitchy risers drive a tense club groove, with filtered delay throws and staccato percussion keeping the beat right on your heelsPublishRemix
tracks.title: Kick Chrome
